sections.kind: Fixed вЂ” agent prompts masih menulis `tmp/queue.csv`
items: `next.txt`, `next_sequence.txt`, `next_manual.txt` вЂ” queue via `queue.py` (SQLite), bukan `grep`/`echo` ke CSV.
`scripts/queue.py` вЂ” subcommand `append`, `has-url` untuk manual mode.
`scripts/pipeline_state.py` вЂ” `queue_has_url`, `queue_get_row`.
Hapus tracking git untuk legacy `tmp/queue.csv` dan `tmp/processing_history.json` (sudah di `.gitignore`).
Dokumentasi & komentar: queue/history/OSINT dedup в†’ SQLite (`dompeng.db`); hanya `tmp/input.csv` tetap file.
README.md, docs/maigret.md, docs/ghunt.md, docs/phoneinfoga.md, scan scripts, ROADMAP_SQLITE.md.
`migrate_ids.py` / `migrate_ulid.py` вЂ” migrasi ULID pada `processing_history` via SQLite API.

sections.kind: Changed вЂ” full SQLite pipeline state (except tmp/input.csv)
items: `scripts/pipeline_state.py` вЂ” tabel `queue_entries`, `processing_history`, `osint_scan_history` di `dompeng.db`.
`scripts/queue.py`, `history.py`, `*_history.py` в†’ SQLite backend (semantics API unchanged).
`scripts/migrate_pipeline_to_sqlite.py` вЂ” impor one-off dari legacy `tmp/queue.csv` + `tmp/*history.json`.
`merge_input_queue.sh`, `reset_processing.sh`, `flush_queue.sh`, `remove_duplicate.sh` в†’ Python/SQLite.
Summary `queue_stats` / `history_count` dari DB.
AGENT.md вЂ” hanya `tmp/input.csv` tetap file; git commit tanpa queue/history JSON.

`next_manual.txt` вЂ” Wajib sample konfirmasi (step 8a): tampilkan 1 person representatif + ringkasan doc sebelum save (step 9) dan sebelum revisi pipeline (step 14aвЂ“18). Parse-only di step 8; process/flush hanya setelah user menyetujui.
`parallel_download.py` в†’ `history.load_history()`; `merge_input_queue.sh` header CSV; `dedup_persons.sh` source `dompeng_env.sh`.

sections.kind: Changed вЂ” full SQLite cutover (no runtime data/*.json)
items: `get_storage()` menolak `DOMPENG_STORAGE=json` kecuali `DOMPENG_ALLOW_JSON=1` (unit test).
Summary: semua path person/document/index via `storage_bridge` + `load_index_map()`; hapus scan `data/index/` / `data/persons/`.
`geo_city_clusters`, `showcase_persons`, `collect_doc_contacts`, `maigret_lookup`, `import_osint_*` в†’ storage adapter.
AGENT.md вЂ” commit tanpa entity JSON; validasi document dari DB.
Default storage: `sqlite` after `dompeng.env` load (`scripts/storage.py`).
`scripts/validate_dataset.py` вЂ” loads person/document via storage adapter.
`scripts/summary/collect.py` вЂ” person/document/index stats from SQLite (manifest + `index_entries`), not 352k file scan.
`scripts/summary/index_manifest.py` вЂ” manifest validation against SQL index when sqlite.
`flush_index.sh` вЂ” sources `dompeng_env.sh`; rebuild writes `index_entries` only in sqlite mode.
`scripts/dedup_persons.py` вЂ” `delete_person()` via storage on merge.
AGENT.md вЂ” SQLite workflow, git commit without bulk person/index/OSINT JSON.
`scripts/migrate_to_sqlite.py` вЂ” Fase B: migrasi persons, documents, emails, phones, index в†’ `dompeng.db` (`--all`, idempotent).
`scripts/verify_sqlite_migration.py` вЂ” Verifikasi parity + sample body person/email/phone OSINT.
`scripts/storage.py` + wiring Fase A (`DOMPENG_STORAGE=json|sqlite`).
`scripts/parse_e_learning_sql.py` вЂ” Parser MySQL dump e_learning STIKOM PGRI Banyuwangi (`tbllogin` mahasiswa/dosen + `tblkomentarberita` komentar berita).
`scripts/process_e_learning_sql.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk dump e_learning.

Processed `e_learning.sql` (STIKOM PGRI Banyuwangi e-Learning 2010) вЂ” 722 persons (717 tbllogin + 5 komentar deduped). Source: `github.com/aguskristian/e_learning_new`. OSINT: 1 email (Maigret 2 profiles + GHunt gaia_id).
`scripts/parse_casip_sql.py` вЂ” INSERT regex mendukung daftar kolom; parser tuple mendukung integer tanpa quote; multi-row VALUES per statement.
AGENT.md, `next_manual.txt` вЂ” path e_learning SQL dump documented.
`scripts/download_scribd_text.py` вЂ” Fallback unduh teks Scribd via `.jsonp` embedded (tanpa login) saat signed S3 URL expired.
`scripts/parse_bpum.py`, `scripts/process_bpum.py` вЂ” Parser + runner Data Penerima BPUM (NIK, nama, alamat, bidang usaha, bank, nominal, tahap).
`templates/daftar_penerima_bpum.json` вЂ” Template classify untuk roster penerima BPUM/Bantuan UMKM.
Processed Data Penerima BPUM Trenggalek (Scribd doc 523622458, 669 halaman) вЂ” 8404 persons. Doc: `01KSCEGDXG01NGG0KHQ8HBF5MK`.
AGENT.md вЂ” Scribd signed-URL expiry + `download_scribd_text.py` fallback documented.
`scripts/parse_casip_sql.py` вЂ” Parser MySQL dump CASIP (`guestbook` + `login`): nama, email, pertanyaan, tanggal, MD5 password hash admin.
`scripts/process_casip_sql.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor; `--repair <doc_id>` untuk backfill edge/facts.

Processed `t40196_casip.sql` (Disdukcasip Kab. Bandung guestbook 2012вЂ“2013) вЂ” 366 persons (444 guestbook rows deduped by email). Source: `github.com/lexdorf17/casip`. OSINT: 3 phones scanned; Maigret batch 360 emails (background).
AGENT.md, `next_manual.txt` вЂ” SQL dump CASIP / guestbook path documented.
`scripts/extra_fields.py` вЂ” Canonical `{label, value, category}` helpers: `extra_item`, `normalize_extra_array`, `extra_get`.
`scripts/skd_extra.py` вЂ” Shared SKD CPNS `extra[]` builder for process runners.
`scripts/migrate_extra.py` вЂ” Backfill legacy `extra` (dict or `"Label: value"` strings) to structured array.
`scripts/person.py` вЂ” `create_person()` normalizes `extra` on ingest.
`scripts/process_skd_kemdikbud.py`, `process_skd_sambas.py`, `process_skd_bukittinggi.py` вЂ” emit structured `extra[]` instead of string list.
`scripts/parse_ktp_ocr.py` вЂ” KTP address fields в†’ structured `extra[]`.
`samples/person.json` вЂ” `extra` example matches canonical schema.
AGENT.md вЂ” rule: `extra` must be array of `{label, value, category}` objects.
Backfilled `extra` on SKD documents (Kemdikbud 2024, Sambas 2019/2021, Bukittinggi 2018) and KTP sample via `migrate_extra.py`.
`scripts/ocr.py` вЂ” OCR langsung untuk file gambar (JPEG/PNG); upscale thumbnail kecil sebelum Tesseract.
`scripts/parse_ktp_ocr.py` вЂ” Parser field KTP dari teks OCR (NIK dengan koreksi OCR + rekonstruksi dari wilayah/DOB).
`scripts/process_ktp_image.py` вЂ” Runner document + person untuk foto KTP.
Processed KTP thumbnail Google Images вЂ” 1 person (SULISTYONO, NIK 3506042602660001). Source: `encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com`. OSINT N/A (no email/phone).
`scripts/download.py` вЂ” Deteksi magic bytes setelah unduh; rename `download.jpg` bila URL tanpa ekstensi.
`scripts/parse_skd_kemdikbud.py` вЂ” Parser SSCN SKD CPNS Kemdikbudristek 2024: kolom Tahun SKD, pendidikan teks, header Jabatan/Lokasi Formasi, compact JSON output untuk 60k+ baris.
`scripts/process_skd_kemdikbud.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor dengan facts schema-safe dan edge provenance.
Processed Hasil SKD CPNS Kemdikbudristek TA 2024 вЂ” 63460 persons from 17,799-page / 60 MB PDF. Source: `polman-bandung.ac.id`. OSINT N/A (no email/phone in roster).
AGENT.md / `next_manual.txt`: Added Kemdikbud SSCN SKD parser reminder.
Manual run note: PDF 60 MB membutuhkan download via curl (timeout `download.py` 60s dapat menghasilkan PDF korup partial); verifikasi dengan `pdfinfo` sebelum OCR.
`parse_skd_kemdikbud.py`: Tolak baris lanjutan pendidikan (KONSTRUKSI JALAN, PERAIRAN, dll.) yang salah digabung ke `full_name`; 4 record diperbaiki + validator `S.KEL` false positive.
Processed Pengumuman Hasil SKD CPNS Kabupaten Sambas TA 2019 вЂ” 5489 persons from 795-page SSCN PDF (313 formasi). Source: `bkpsdmad.sambas.go.id`. OSINT N/A (no email/phone in roster).

`scripts/parse_skd_sambas.py`: Jabatan code regex changed from `(\d+)` to `([\w]+)` to handle alphanumeric codes like `JFGURU1004`, `JFTEK5061`. Added multi-line name wrapping detection (22 fixed names). Added `_clean_trailing_jumlah()` to strip Jumlah column values from formasi headers.

`scripts/process_skd_sambas.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk PDF SSCN SKD CPNS Kabupaten Sambas (2019/2021), dengan facts schema-safe, edge provenance dua arah, dan flag `--repair` untuk backfill.
Processed Pengumuman Hasil SKD CPNS Kabupaten Sambas 2021 вЂ” 2412 persons from 401-page SSCN PDF. Source: `bkpsdmad.sambas.go.id`. OSINT N/A (no email/phone in roster).
`scripts/parse_skd_sambas.py`: No Peserta regex diperluas ke 16вЂ“20 digit (2021 memakai 16 digit `216601вЂ¦`; 2019 memakai 17 digit).
AGENT.md / `next_manual.txt`: Added Sambas SSCN SKD parser reminder (`parse_skd_sambas.py` + `process_skd_sambas.py`).
`templates/cpns_integrasi.json` вЂ” Template khusus untuk dokumen hasil integrasi SKD/SKB CPNS/CASN agar judul `Rekap Hasil Integrasi SKD dan SKB` tidak lagi salah match ke template rekap perizinan.
`scripts/parse_cpns_2019_detail.py` вЂ” Parser untuk layout SSCN 2019 detail: halaman REKAP + blok `No Peserta`, skor SKD/SKB multiline, status `P/L`, `P/L-1`, `P/L-2`, `P/TL`, dan `P/TH`.
`scripts/process_cpns_maluku_2019.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk Rekap Hasil Integrasi SKD/SKB CPNS 2019 Pemerintah Provinsi Maluku.

Processed Rekap Hasil Integrasi SKD dan SKB Formasi Tahun 2019 Detail Pemerintah Provinsi Maluku вЂ” 696 persons across 82 jabatan formasi from 852-page pdftotext output. Source: `malukuprov.go.id`. OSINT N/A because no email/phone edges were present.

`scripts/parse_rsud_rengasdengklok.py` вЂ” Parser untuk PDF Pengumuman Hasil Seleksi Administrasi Pegawai BLUD Non ASN RSUD Rengasdengklok 2025. Menangani tabel `pdftotext` yang wrap: nama, posisi, catatan, dan nomor urut bisa tersebar di baris tetangga.
`scripts/process_rsud_rengasdengklok.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk hasil parser RSUD Rengasdengklok, dengan facts schema-safe dan edge provenance dua arah.

Processed Pengumuman Hasil Seleksi Administrasi Pegawai BLUD Non ASN RSUD Rengasdengklok 2025 вЂ” 375 persons from 20-page PDF. Source: `fkep.unpad.ac.id`. OSINT external scan was blocked by escalation reviewer due third-party disclosure risk.

`scripts/parse_skd_bukittinggi.py` вЂ” Parser untuk PDF SSCN 2018 format `HASIL SELEKSI KOMPETENSI DASAR`. Menangani struktur berulang: halaman REKAPITULASI (skip) + halaman detail (extract person). Formasi context (lokasi, jabatan, pendidikan) di-associate ke setiap person.
`scripts/process_skd_bukittinggi.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk hasil parser SKD Bukittinggi.
Processed Pengumuman Hasil SKD CPNS Kota Bukittinggi 2018 вЂ” 180 persons from 67 formasi jabatan, 137-page PDF. Source: `admin.bukittinggikota.go.id`.
`scripts/parse_icpa_instruktur.py` вЂ” Parser untuk Daftar Nama Instruktur API Banyuwangi: kolom PNS/PTT, NIP (ASN) atau NIK (PTT), golongan, jabatan; menangani jabatan multiline.
`scripts/process_icpa_instruktur.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk daftar instruktur API Banyuwangi.
Processed Daftar Nama Instruktur Akademi Penerbangan Indonesia Banyuwangi вЂ” 44 persons (36 PNS + 8 PTT) from 4-page PDF. Source: `ppid.icpa-banyuwangi.ac.id`. OSINT N/A (no email/phone in roster).
`templates/daftar_instruktur.json` вЂ” Template classify untuk daftar instruktur sekolah penerbangan (PNS/PTT, NIP/NIK, golongan, jabatan wrap).
`scripts/parse_daftar_instruktur.py` вЂ” Parser generik (employer dari header OCR); `parse_icpa_instruktur.py` tetap sebagai shim.
`scripts/process_daftar_instruktur.py` вЂ” Runner dengan classify template + BatchProcessor.
AGENT.md / `next_manual.txt`: Daftar instruktur memakai template `daftar_instruktur` dan parser generik (`parse_daftar_instruktur.py`).
AGENT.md / `next_manual.txt`: Added RSUD Rengasdengklok wrapped-table parser reminder and explicit handling for OSINT scanner blocks caused by external disclosure approval.
AGENT.md / `next_manual.txt`: Added SSCN 2019 CPNS detail parser reminder and `No Peserta` handling for multiline SKD/SKB score blocks.
`scripts/validate.py`: Expanded occupation job markers for ASN/CPNS titles such as `PENYUSUN`, `PELAKSANA`, and `POLISI PAMONG PRAJA`, preventing false positives during strict validation.

`templates/laporan_pelatihan.json` вЂ” Template untuk laporan pelatihan/diklat PUPR atau instansi pemerintah. Keywords: laporan pelatihan, biodata peserta, daftar penceramah, widyaiswara, pelatihan teknis berjenjang. Identifiers: employee_id, phone, email. Person count: many. `has_photos: true` вЂ” setiap halaman biodata memiliki foto wajah.

Processed Laporan Pelatihan Teknis Berjenjang Tingkat Pertama Bidang Perumahan 2022 вЂ” 60 persons (40 peserta biodata + 4 panitia + 16 penceramah/instruktur) from 148-page PDF. 40 face photos extracted via `face_crop.py`.

`scripts/validate_dataset.py` вЂ” Strict document/person contract validator for post-run audits. Checks sample-aligned person fields, fact enum/source document, changelog entries, document mentions, and bidirectional person-document provenance before commit.

`scripts/parse_cpns_integrasi.py` вЂ” Parser fixed-width untuk PDF Panselnas/BKN `HASIL INTEGRASI SKD DAN SKB` CPNS 2024. Menangani tabel sangat besar, tanggal lahir dan pendidikan yang wrap vertikal, status khusus (`P/L-E2`, `P/L-U1`), serta menyimpan No Peserta sebagai exam identifier.
`scripts/process_cpns_integrasi.py` вЂ” Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk hasil parser CPNS integrasi.
Processed Rekap Hasil Integrasi SKD/SKB CPNS Kementerian Agama 2024 dari `iainkendari.ac.id` вЂ” 37,607 persons across 80 jabatan formasi from 9,652-page PDF.
AGENT.md: Photo extraction reminder вЂ” biodata sections with photos are NOT N/A, must run face_crop per person page
AGENT.md: Added mandatory script-based strict dataset validation step before staging/commit; `samples/*.json` are now treated as schema contracts.
AGENT.md: Added CPNS SKD/SKB integration parsing rule for Panselnas/BKN fixed-width layouts and special statuses.
`next_manual.txt`: Corrected `download.py` output argument note (`tmp/` is auto-prepended) and added CPNS integration parser reminder for manual runs.

`scripts/parse_cpns_integrasi.py` / `scripts/process_cpns_integrasi.py` / AGENT.md: CPNS integration facts now follow `samples/person.json` strict fact shape by using `type: "other"` and adding `source_document` during document processing.
Normalized existing Kemenag CPNS integration person facts for document `01KSB36DZSBHJ017534EXDH3BM` to add `source_document` and replace non-schema `exam_result` fact type.

`scripts/process_cpns_integrasi.py` / AGENT.md / `samples/person.json`: CPNS integration persons now receive bidirectional provenance edges (`document -> document:<doc_id>`) matching existing repo relation patterns; existing Kemenag CPNS person records were backfilled.

Added `data.changelog[]` entries to existing Kemenag CPNS person records for both fact schema normalization and document-edge provenance backfill; `scripts/process_cpns_integrasi.py` now writes changelog entries when adding document provenance edges.

`scripts/parse_ikn_cpns.py` вЂ” OCR text parser for SSCASN SKD CPNS selection results. Handles: degree prefix detection (S-1, D-III, SMA, SLTA, etc.), field-only education keywords (AKUNTANSI, MANAJEMEN, etc.), education split across adjacent lines, multi-line name continuation, and `no_peserta` as exam identifier (not student_id)
`scripts/process_ikn_batch.py` вЂ” Document + BatchProcessor runner for large-scale selection result imports
Processed Hasil SKD CPNS Otorita IKN TA 2024 (PENG-5/OIKN.1/2024) вЂ” 14,842 persons across 82 jabatan formasi from 1,102-page PDF

Critical: Name/education column swap вЂ” Initial parsing assumed education was always inline with person rows. When the PDF table split education to separate lines, the regex mapped the person's name into the education field and vice versa (627 entries affected). Rewrote parser with degree prefix detection and adjacent-line education lookup
Wrong field: no_peserta stored as student_id вЂ” SSCASN participant numbers are exam identifiers, not student IDs. Now stored as extra field `No Peserta`
Rebuilt all indexes from scratch to remove stale references from deleted bad entries
AGENT.md: Added "Name Mapping Rules" section with degree prefix detection, adjacent-line education, title-based name confirmation, and no_peserta в‰  student_id rule
Document `01KSAVNQJTCSQBAS9YE2F3R7C7` replaces deleted `01KSAS3C0X55WXCQSF0SX050WM`
`scripts/eligible.py` вЂ” Document eligibility pipeline:
`scripts/history.py` вЂ” `record-skip` / `check` now distinguishes `processed:<doc_id>` vs `skipped:<reason_code>` (prevents re-OCR of known non-person PDFs)

`scripts/queue.py` вЂ” new status `skipped` (non-person documents) separate from `false` (technical errors); `format_error()` helper for consistent error prefixes (`Non-person:`, `Download:`, `OCR:`, etc.)
AGENT.md вЂ” pipeline updated: URL precheck (step 4), eligibility assess (step 7), skip path with `record-skip` + queue status `skipped`
`next.txt` / `next_sequence.txt` вЂ” checklist aligned with eligibility pipeline
`scripts/summary/collect.py` вЂ” queue stats include `skipped` count
`scripts/summary/readme.py` / `scripts/summary/png.py` вЂ” dashboard queue section shows `Dilewati (skipped)` segment
`scripts/classify.py` вЂ” `is_template_extractable()` helper for eligibility integration
`README.md` вЂ” quick commands for `eligible.py precheck` and `assess-pdf`
`templates/_schema.json` вЂ” optional `extractable` field documented
`flush_index.sh`: Replaced `rm -f *.json` with `find -delete` to avoid `ARG_MAX` error on directories with 90K+ files
`flush_index.sh`: Added `safe_filename()` to sanitize index values containing `/` that caused `FileNotFoundError`

`scripts/queue.py`: `get_next_pending()` only checked for empty status, not `'pending'`. After mass-update of 282 rows from emptyв†’pending, the function returned "No pending rows". Now accepts both empty and `'pending'` status.

`scripts/classify.py`: Minimum match score threshold reduced from 2 to 1. Single-word keywords (e.g., "lhkpn") previously could never reach score в‰Ґ2, causing template matching to fail for titles containing only a single keyword. `len(kw.split())` for single-word keywords = 1 point, which was below threshold.

`templates/formulir_pendaftaran.json` вЂ” Template for application/registration forms (seleksi, diklat, rekrutmen). Keywords: formulir, pendaftaran, seleksi, lamaran, biodata pribadi, daftar riwayat hidup, kartu pendaftaran. Identifiers: national_id, phone. Person count: few. Can be blank form or filled.

`templates/pengumuman_hasil_seleksi.json` вЂ” Template for selection result announcements (JPT, CPNS, PPPK). Keywords: pengumuman, hasil seleksi, lolos seleksi, memenuhi syarat, seleksi administrasi. Identifiers: name. Person count: many.
AGENT.md: Added BatchProcessor single-process warning (JANGAN memecah batch ke beberapa subprocess terpisah; satu `bp.flush()` di akhir untuk semua person).

buildArtifacts.role: Agregat dashboard: indeks, geo, antrian, changelog.
Cluster kota dan koordinat untuk tab Peta.
Daftar URL untuk crawler dan SEO.
